meta_title: For Freelancers: Claude Code skills setup to Solve slow development speed (Beginner Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome slow development speed. A Beginner-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: Claude Code Setup for Freelancers: Beat Slow Development
content.seo_description: Master Claude Code skills to accelerate your dev speed. A beginner-friendly resource for freelancers using Antigravity to ship SaaS apps faster.
content.answer_block: To eliminate slow development, leverage Claude Code to automate repetitive boilerplate and architectural refactoring. By integrating Claude Code with Antigravity, you transform your terminal into an AI-powered engineering engine, enabling you to ship production-grade features in hours rather than days while maintaining high code quality and consistency.
content.intro:
The clock is ticking. Your client expects a high-fidelity prototype by Friday, but you are buried under a mountain of boilerplate, framework nuances, and debugging loops. Slow development isn't just a technical hurdle; it is a direct threat to your freelance profit margins and your sanity.

But the era of manual coding is shifting. By weaponizing Claude Code, you move from being a typist to an architect. This guide bridges the gap between raw intent and executable code, showing you how to turn your terminal into a powerhouse of efficiency, ensuring you never miss a deadline again.

steps.title: Environment Initialization
steps.description: Establish the foundational structure of your project to ensure Claude Code has clear context for all subsequent file generation.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Initialize a clean project structure for a modern SaaS application using Next.js, Tailwind, and Supabase. Provide a modular folder architecture.

steps.title: Automated Architectural Scaffolding
steps.description: Use AI to generate complex database schemas and API routes, eliminating the need to write repetitive CRUD boilerplate.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a robust Supabase database schema for a user authentication and subscription management system.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "create database schema for auth and subscription tables"

steps.title: Rapid Feature Implementation
steps.description: Focus on business logic while the AI handles the implementation details of UI components and state management.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Build a high-converting landing page component using Tailwind CSS that includes a hero section, pricing table, and testimonials.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "implement landing page UI with responsiveness and accessibility best practices"

steps.title: Intelligent Refactoring
steps.description: Clean up technical debt and optimize code performance automatically before handing off to the client.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review the current codebase for performance bottlenecks, unnecessary re-renders, and unused dependencies.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "refactor codebase for performance and remove unused imports"

steps.title: Automated Documentation
steps.description: Generate professional technical documentation and READMEs to impress clients and simplify future maintenance.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a comprehensive README.md file including setup instructions, environment variables, and deployment steps.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run "generate professional README and technical documentation for this repository"

pro_tips: Always define a custom .clauderc file to inject your coding style preferences and avoid repetitive formatting prompts.
Use Antigravity to generate 'Test Plans' before writing code to ensure your Claude Code implementation aligns with client requirements.
Leverage the 'Context Injection' feature in Claude Code by pointing it to your documentation folder for domain-specific accuracy.
Pipeline your CLI commands to chain complex tasks, such as generating a migration and updating the corresponding UI component in one pass.
Use 'dry-run' flags whenever possible to audit the AI's proposed file changes before they overwrite critical production files.
content.next_steps: After completing this setup, begin building a small, non-critical module to test your workflow before applying these AI-driven patterns to your primary client projects.
content.conversion_block: You now possess the toolkit to outpace any traditional developer. Stop manually typing repetitive code and start scaling your freelance agency with intelligent automation. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
